name: @owlat/mail-canon
description: RFC 6376 §3.4 DKIM canonicalization — the ONE shared canonicalizer (U4). A dependency-free leaf: node:crypto/node:buffer only, so both the inbound verifier (@owlat/mail-auth) and the outbound signer (@owlat/mail-message) consume it without a build cycle and stay Convex-'use node' safe.
